## Summary

Implement 4 targeted performance and accessibility optimizations for the Moonmood PWA.

## Changes

### 1. Blob animation reduction on mobile
- **File:** `src/hooks/useIsMobile.ts` (new), `src/components/moonmood/MoonmoodGradientOverlay.tsx`
- Reduce BLOB_DRIFT from 4 to 2 blobs on mobile viewports (≤768px) via new `useIsMobile` hook
- Light mode routes (settings, privacy, favorites, report) continue to use 2 blobs
- Hook uses `matchMedia` with SSR safety and reactive `change` listener

### 2. prefers-reduced-motion support
- **Files:** `src/components/mood/LiquidSlider.tsx`, `src/components/mood/ReadOnlyView.tsx`, `src/components/mood/SaveMoodButton.tsx`
- Disable looping animations when OS "Reduce Motion" is active:
  - LiquidSlider glow pulse → static opacity
  - ReadOnlyView breathing emoji → static scale
  - SaveMoodButton sparkle burst → skipped entirely
- All one-shot transitions (drag spring, tap, page entrance) preserved

### 3. Code splitting with next/dynamic
- **Files:** `src/app/oracle/page.tsx` (new `OraclePageClient.tsx`), `src/app/history/page.tsx`
- `/oracle` and `/history` routes lazy-loaded via `next/dynamic` with `ssr: false` and `LoadingScreen` fallback
- Oracle page First Load JS reduced to 5.78 kB (heavy oracle deps in separate chunk)

### 4. React.memo on home components
- **Files:** `src/components/home/EcoDelGiorno.tsx`, `src/components/home/SticazziCard.tsx`
- Both wrapped in `React.memo()` to prevent unnecessary re-renders

### 5. DRY refactor
- **File:** `src/lib/matchMedia.ts` (new)
- Extracted shared `isMatchMediaAvailable` utility used by both `useReducedMotion` and `useIsMobile`
- Standardized dynamic import pattern across oracle and history routes

## Requirements addressed

| Requirement | Status |
|-------------|--------|
| BLOB_DRIFT mobile reduction | ✅ |
| prefers-reduced-motion support | ✅ |
| Code splitting /oracle, /history | ✅ |
| React.memo EcoDelGiorno, SticazziCard | ✅ |
| Manifest already exists (UI-03) | ✅ (pre-existing) |

## Verification

- TypeScript: clean
- Tests: 120/120 passing
- Build: static export successful
- Lint: no errors

## Todo

- [ ] Review implementation
